summary: Será el banco español más generoso el año que viene, incluso después de haber repartido el doble de su valor en Bolsa en los últimos cinco ejercicios. Leer

title: Garamendi se presentará a la reelección para presidir CEOE hasta 2030
summary: El líder de la principal organización empresarial española asegura que el único motivo del adelanto del proceso electoral es sortear la Cumbre Iberoamericana de Jefes de Estado y de Gobierno de noviembre. Leer

title: Feijóo exige la disolución de las Cortes y convocar elecciones generales
summary: El presidente del PP, Alberto Núñez Feijóo, afirma que los casos del corrupción "no son piedras en el camino" y reclama elecciones anticipadas ante la "indignidad" del Gobierno. Leer

title: Sánchez niega conocer la corrupción del PSOE y califica de "acoso y derribo" el juicio a su esposa
summary: El presidente del Gobierno, Pedro Sánchez, renueva su apoyo a Zapatero y acusa a la ultraderecha de perseguir a su esposa y a su hermano para dañar al Gobierno. Leer

summary: En vísperas de su 250 aniversario, Estados Unidos y el orden mundial que creó se encuentran en crisis. Leer

title: Garamendi pone en marcha el proceso electoral para elegir presidente de CEOE antes de noviembre
summary: El presidente de la CEOE, Antonio Garamendi, ha decidido arrancar el proceso de cara a las próximas elecciones con una convocatoria del comité ejecutivo y la junta directiva de la patronal el próximo 1 de julio. Leer

title: Spain's PM denies Socialist corruption as 'widespread' as media and opponents claim
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez on Wednesday dismissed allegations of "widespread corruption" against his Socialist Party after an ex-top aide was jailed for a corruption scandal that risks toppling the government.

title: What's behind the recent spike in drownings in Spain?
summary: Five children and seven adults drowned in Spain over the weekend, as well as nine more the previous weekend. What's causing the recent increase in people - particularly minors - tragically dying at sea in Spain?

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Wednesday
summary: Castilla-La Mancha town sees temperatures below 10C during heatwave, drop in cruise ship passengers following hantavirus cases, six town hall officials arrested in money laundering investigation and more news from Spain this Wednesday June 24th.

title: 'It's f**ked us': Brits in Spain spell out the impact of Brexit ten years on
summary: From bureaucracy to broken dreams, The Local's British readers in Spain explain the real-life consequences Brexit has had for them as the UK marks ten years since it voted to leave the EU.

title: Goats, horses and fire: the weird ways Spain celebrates San Juan
summary: Nobody celebrates festivities with quite the same flair and diversity as Spain, and Saint John's Eve (June 23rd or 24th) is no exception.

title: Spain's PM vows to press on despite ex-minister's corruption conviction
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez said Tuesday that his government would continue its work, despite mounting political pressure following the 24-year prison sentence handed to his former right-hand man, ex-transport minister José Luis Ábalos.
